element_introduction_order.mastery_context: player chooses from 12 available wrestlers (13th mystery wrestler unused)
high-damage character-specific techniques; mystery wrestler lacks this
post-match wrestler presentation and music selection

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: turn-based wrestling encounter with player-driven tension management through move selection and timing

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: mystery wrestler ??Mystery?? accessible via Pro Action Replay codes

difficulty_curve.early_game: wrestler selection allows difficulty self-selection through opponent choice
notable_spikes: finishing move execution difficulty varies by wrestler

notable_level_patterns.description: One-on-one wrestling encounter following selection phase. Wrestler choice determines moveset complexity and finishing move availability.
Championship victory triggers Titantron display and theme music playback. Unused track in Genesis/32X versions suggests potential victory sequence variation.

sources_used: tcrf - WWF Raw (SNES) - The Cutting Room Floor
